clusters.justification: These terms co-activate within salience and corticolimbic networks, representing the macro-level processing, autonomic physiological expression, and regulation of emotional states.
This cluster is unified by the frontostriatal and mesolimbic networks, reflecting the broad functional domain of incentive processing, behavioral reinforcement, and economic decision-making.

These terms are bound by their shared recruitment of the default mode network, representing internally directed, self-generated processing used to abstractly model the subjective mental states of oneself and others.
